name: Beef and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef over medium heat. Break up any clumps with a spatula.
2. Drain off excess fat.
3. In a small bowl, mix together salt, pepper, finely chopped onions, and undiluted tomato soup.
4. Peel and slice the potatoes into even pieces.
5. Place alternating layers of potatoes and meat in a crockpot, starting with potatoes at the bottom.
6. Pour the soup mixture over everything.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 4 to 6 hours.
8. Turn the temperature control to HIGH.
9. Pour the light cream evenly over all ingredients.
10. Cover and cook on HIGH for an additional 15 to 20 minutes.
This recipe makes 6 servings.
